{{DISPLAYTITLE:OneGame Pro Championship Season 3}} {{OneGame Series Navbox}} {{Infobox league |game=bgmi |liquipediatier=4 |name=OneGame Pro Championship Season 3 |tickername=OneGame Pro Champ. S3 |shortname=Season 3 |image=OneGame Pro Championship Season 3 lightmode.png |imagedark=OneGame Pro Championship Season 3 darkmode.png |icon=OneGame Pro Championship Season 3 lightmode.png |icondarkmode=OneGame Pro Championship Season 3 darkmode.png |type=Online |team_number=16 |series=OneGame Series |organizer=OneGame Esports |organizer-link=https://www.instagram.com/onegameesports |organizer2=One Digital Entertainment|organizer2-link=https://www.onedigitalentertainment.com/ |mode=squads|perspective=tpp |localcurrency=inr|prizepool=500000 |country=India |sdate=2025-12-20 |edate=2025-12-22 |rulebook= |twitter= |facebook=profile.php?id=61555969237873 |instagram=onegameesports |youtube=@One.GameOfficial |web=https://one.game/ |discord= |previous=OneGame/Pro_Championship/Season_2{{!}}Season 2 }} ==About== ===Format=== * '''Pre Quarter Finals:''''' December 12 - 15, 2025 ** 64 teams, 4 matchdays. *** 32 qualified teams. *** 32 invited teams. *** Each group will play 6 matches. ** Teams are divided equally into 4 groups of 16. ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 8 teams from each group (Total 32 teams)}} advance to Quarter Finals. ** {{Bgcolortext|down|Bottom 8 teams from each group}} are eliminated.
* '''Quarter Finals:''''' December 16 - 17, 2025 ** 32 teams, 2 matchdays. ** Teams are divided equally into 2 groups of 16. ** Each group will play 6 matches. ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 4 teams from each group (Total 8 teams)}} advance to Grand Finals. ** {{Bgcolortext|stayup|Bottom 12 teams from each group (Total 24 teams)}} advance to Semi Finals.
* '''Semi Finals:''''' December 18 - 19, 2025 ** 24 teams, 2 matchdays. ** Teams are divided equally into 3 groups of 8. ** Round-robin format. ** Each group will play 8 matches. ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 8 teams}} advance to the Grand Finals. ** {{Bgcolortext|down|The rest}} are eliminated.
* '''Grand Finals:''''' December 20 - 22, 2025 ** 16 teams, 3 matchdays. ** 18 matches (6 each day). {{box|start|padding=1em}} ====Points Distribution==== {{Points10|toggle=false|killterm=finish}}
